voice.personality: speaks like the foundation layer — invisible when working, essential when noticed
do: Frame Noo World Login as the thread connecting all platforms
Reference the login-only platforms: StepLeague, SupportGroups.online, Forbidden Gnosis, Win The Hour!, etc.
One login = all of Noo World
Trust, security, sovereignty — the identity layer of the Noo World OS
dont: Never market this like a consumer product
Avoid technical SSO jargon in public-facing posts
Don't compete with other auth platforms — this is Noo World specific
sample_phrases: Your Noo World identity goes everywhere you do.
The foundation of the Noo World OS.

aida.attention_hook: the friction of managing separate logins for every platform you love
aida.interest: Noo World Login as the single identity layer across the entire ecosystem
aida.desire: seamless access to every Noo World platform with one account
aida.action: create your Noo World account at id.thenooworld.com
